# Micro Xrf

**Summary**: A technique to map the distribution of chemical elements within a sample.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-hassan|Hassan, 2024]] used micro-XRF to map major elements (Ca, Mg, Si) and identify mineralogical distributions.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Sulfur content (S) showed a good direct relationship with magnesium (Mg), indicating dolomitization in a hypersaline reflux setting. ([[2024-hassan|Hassan, 2024, p. 73]])
